This file contains a sample of what a Claude Code agent outputs during a tandem run.
It is used by integration tests to verify that the orchestrator correctly parses
agent output and detects completion signals.

--- SAMPLE OUTPUT START ---

Reading ticket PROJ-1...
Ticket: Add user profile endpoint and profile page

Understanding existing codebase structure...
- Found UserModel at src/models/user.ts
- Found AuthMiddleware at src/middleware/auth.ts
- Found StorageService at src/services/storage.ts
- Found existing API envelope pattern at src/types/api.ts

Planning implementation:
1. Add name and bio columns to users table (migration required)
2. Implement GET /users/:userId/profile
3. Implement PATCH /users/:userId/profile
4. Implement POST /users/:userId/avatar (multipart)
5. Write unit tests
6. Write contract.json

Creating migration: migrations/0012_add_profile_fields.sql
Creating: src/controllers/profile.controller.ts
Creating: src/routes/profile.routes.ts
Updating: src/routes/index.ts (registering new routes)
Creating: src/tests/profile.controller.test.ts

Running tests...
✓ GET /users/:userId/profile returns 200 with profile data
✓ GET /users/:userId/profile returns 404 for unknown user
✓ PATCH /users/:userId/profile updates name and bio
✓ PATCH /users/:userId/profile returns 403 for wrong user
✓ POST /users/:userId/avatar stores file and returns URL
✓ POST /users/:userId/avatar rejects files over 2MB
✓ POST /users/:userId/avatar rejects non-image files

All tests passing. Committing...

[tandem/PROJ-1-be a1b2c3d] feat(PROJ-1): add user profile endpoints

Writing contract.json to tickets/PROJ-1/contract.json...
Contract written successfully.

Backend agent complete.

--- SAMPLE OUTPUT END ---
